The Pivotal Voice Podcast

Honest conversations with Ellis County leaders and change-makers. Real conversations. Local leadership. Informed voters.

Episodes Coming Soon

The Pivotal Voice Podcast is launching soon. Subscribe below to be notified when the first episode drops.

Our Mission Pillars

Foster Honest Conversations

Creating space for authentic dialogue between leaders and the community

Accountability

Holding leaders accountable through transparency and engagement

Civil Discussion

Fostering respectful debate on critical local issues

Government Transparency

Making government data accessible and understandable for all

Never Miss an Episode

Subscribe to The Pivotal Voice Podcast and get notified when new episodes are released.

A non-partisan platform dedicated to creating meaningful dialogue on the issues that shape Ellis County's future.
